description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short, double-barrel configuration, featuring a robust black metal receiver and barrels. The barrels are arranged side-by-side and are relatively short, giving the weapon a stubby appearance. The stock is minimal, consisting of a wooden grip and a large, rounded lever loop, with no full shoulder stock present. The trigger guard is oversized and elongated, forming a loop that accommodates the lever-action mechanism. The finish of the metal parts is glossy black, while the grip and lever are made of dark, polished wood. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for close-quarters use, with a focus on maneuverability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short black metal body, wooden grip, and a large lever loop in place of a full stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels side-by-side and the circular muzzle openings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short double barrels, black metal receiver, wooden grip, and large lever loop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden grip and the split between the two barrels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the lever loop, trigger guard, and the overall compactness.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: no stock (wooden grip and lever loop only)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded loop integrated with the lever, large enough for multiple fingers
